$schema_note: One row per pack. Required: name, title, genre, tags, blurb, author, and either path (community pack folder in this repo) or bundled:true (ships with the base game). genre must be one of the folder names and must match the folder the pack lives in. CI validates all of this (scripts/validate-catalog.mjs). Optional: campaign (finite|open|saga) - the campaign's shape, shown in the in-game browser. Optional: audience ('family' = written for kids and read-together play; shown as a filter on adventure-mode.com/packs).

packs.name: zombie-outbreak
packs.title: WHITEOUT
packs.blurb: Northern Minnesota, deep winter, five weeks after the world went quiet. The cold is as patient as the dead.
packs.author: bluewilliams

packs.name: mafia-omerta
packs.title: OMERTA
packs.blurb: Brickport, New Jersey, 1979. You are nobody in the Marchetti family. That can change.
packs.author: bluewilliams

packs.name: hollowcrown
packs.title: HOLLOWCROWN
packs.blurb: A frontier province above a dead dwarven deep-realm, whose sealed doors have started opening from below.
packs.author: bluewilliams

packs.name: farwake
packs.title: FARWAKE
packs.blurb: Thirty dying star systems, stations and dome colonies, ships and the people who fix them - and faction politics one bad spark from fire.
packs.author: bluewilliams

packs.name: volstead
packs.title: VOLSTEAD
packs.blurb: Calder Bay, 1926. Run your OWN outfit: two guns, one bad corner, a city already carved up. Booze, dope, rackets, elections - build an empire or go legit. Repeal is coming.
packs.author: bluewilliams
